title: Vant-Lynx API Polish
description: Fill in missing props, events, and slots to achieve better Vant API parity. Focus on features that ARE implementable in Lynx (skip platform-impossible ones like teleport, lockScroll, etc.).

context.implementationPattern: Check Vant source for exact prop types and behaviors. Match API signatures exactly.

userStories.title: PickerGroup toolbar and events
userStories.description: Add toolbar with confirm/cancel buttons and missing props/events to PickerGroup.
requirements: Add nextStepText prop for multi-step flows
Add toolbar, title, confirm, cancel slots

userStories.title: TimePicker filter/formatter and slots
userStories.description: Add missing filter, formatter props and slots to TimePicker.
requirements: Add filter prop: (type: string, values: string[]) => string[]
Add formatter prop: (type: string, value: string) => string
Add toolbar, title, confirm, cancel, option slots

userStories.title: DatePicker filter/formatter and slots
userStories.description: Add missing filter, formatter props and slots to DatePicker (same pattern as TimePicker).
requirements: Add toolbar, title, confirm, cancel, option slots

userStories.title: Calendar popup mode integration
userStories.description: Add Popup integration for Calendar poppable mode.
requirements: Add show prop with v-model support
Add update:show, clickOverlay, open, close, opened, closed events

userStories.title: Calendar day formatter
userStories.description: Add formatter prop for custom day rendering in Calendar.
requirements: Day type: { date, type, text, topInfo, bottomInfo, className }
Apply formatter to each day cell

userStories.title: ActionSheet closeable and safeArea
userStories.description: Add closeable icon and safe area props to ActionSheet.
requirements: Add bottom padding for safe area

userStories.title: Form auto-required detection
userStories.description: Add required='auto' mode that auto-detects from field rules.
requirements: Add required prop with 'auto' | boolean values
When 'auto', check if field has 'required' rule
Show asterisk on label when required
Update scrollToError to use element refs

userStories.title: TreeSelect nav item badges
userStories.description: Add dot/badge rendering support for TreeSelect nav items.
requirements: Support badge property on nav items
Support dot property on nav items
Render Badge component on nav items when badge/dot set

userStories.title: CouponList missing props
userStories.description: Add code prop v-model and missing UI props to CouponList.
requirements: Add code prop with v-model support (input value)

userStories.title: Rate iconPrefix support
userStories.description: Add iconPrefix support to Rate component.
requirements: Use Icon component with iconPrefix when provided
Fall back to Unicode stars when no iconPrefix

userStories.title: Uploader callback props
userStories.description: Add afterRead, beforeRead, beforeDelete callback props.
requirements: Add beforeRead prop: (file, detail) => boolean | Promise<boolean>
Add beforeDelete prop: (file, detail) => boolean | Promise<boolean>

userStories.title: Tabs animated transition
userStories.description: Add animated prop for tab content transition (now possible with Transition).
requirements: When animated, use Transition for content swap
Add swipeThreshold prop for swipe gesture sensitivity

userStories.title: Picker expose methods
userStories.description: Expose Picker instance methods via ref.

userStories.title: Dialog expose methods
userStories.description: Expose Dialog instance methods via ref.
